title: pristimera holdeniana
intro: Pristimera holdeniana, also known as the Holden's pristimera, is a type of flowering plant native to the Philippines. It is a climber that belongs to the family Celastraceae and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Pristimera holdeniana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal medicine, and its extracts have been studied for potential use in treating various ailments, including respiratory and cardiovascular diseases.
